requirements.name: physics-drive-and-joint-state
requirements.message: Validate that each driven joint has correct drive configuration and joint state, including required limits and consistency checks against the current joint state values.

requirements.name: robot-schema-links-exist
requirements.message: Robot schema links must exist and be properly connected to joints for kinematic chain definition.

requirements.name: check-robot-relationships
requirements.message: Robot joint and link relationships must be validated for proper kinematic tree structure.

requirements.name: no-articulation-loops
requirements.message: Articulation must have no loops and at most one joint between any two bodies.

requirements.name: physics-joint-max-velocity
requirements.message: PhysX driven joints must have appropriate maximum velocity limits configured.

requirements.name: joint-has-correct-transform-and-state
requirements.message: Driven joints must maintain correct transform relationships and state consistency.

requirements.name: mimic-api-check
requirements.message: Mimic API configuration must be properly validated for coordinated joint motion.

requirements.name: robot-schema-joint-exist
requirements.message: Robot schema joints must exist and be properly defined for Isaac Sim integration.

requirements.name: physics-joint-has-drive-or-mimic-api
requirements.message: PhysX driven joints must implement drive API or mimic functionality for controlled motion.

requirements.name: drive-joint-value-reasonable
requirements.message: Drive joint parameters must be within reasonable ranges for stable simulation. The joint parameters should not be excessively big and should be natural numbers.

requirements.name: joint-has-joint-state-api
requirements.message: Driven joints must implement proper joint state API for simulation state management.
